# [type]: [short description]

Prefix types:
- feat:     New feature
- fix:      Bug fix
- refactor: Code refactoring (no behavior change)
- test:     Adding/updating tests
- docs:     Documentation only
- chore:    Dependencies, CI/CD, build
- perf:     Performance improvement

For specific templates, create PR with:
- Feature:  ?template=feature.md
- Bugfix:   ?template=bugfix.md
- Refactor: ?template=refactor_chore.md

## Description
[What was changed and why?]

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug-fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Chore (dependencies, CI/CD)

## Changes made
- A
- B
- C

## For reviewers
[What should reviewers focus on? Any specific areas of concern?]

## Files affected
- **Production code:**
- **Tests:**
- **Other:**

## How to test
1. [Step 1]
2. [Step 2]
3. [Expected result]

## Checklist
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
